---
title: "Whole Exome Sequencing"
author: "Shubham Agrawal"
date: "2026-06-16"
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
wes <- read_excel("/Users/shubhamagrawal/Desktop/ALL/data/wes/combined_report.xlsx")
head(wes, 20)
```

```{r}
snv_mat <- wes %>%
  mutate(
    SNV = ifelse(is.na(SNV_Consequence), 0, 1)
  ) %>%
  select(Sample, Gene, SNV) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Sample,
    values_from = SNV,
    values_fill = 0
  )

head(snv_mat)
```

```{r}
unique(wes$Copy_Number)
```


```{r}
cnv_mat <- wes %>%
  mutate(
    CN = case_when(
      !is.na(Copy_Number) ~ Copy_Number,
      TRUE ~ 2
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Sample, Gene, CN) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Sample,
    values_from = CN,
    values_fill = 2
  )

cnv_mat <- as.matrix(cnv_mat[,-1])
rownames(cnv_mat) <- cnv_mat[,1]

head(cnv_mat)
```

```{r}
cnv_long <- wes %>%
  mutate(
    DEL = as.integer(grepl("DEL", Combined_class)),
    DUP = as.integer(grepl("DUP", Combined_class))
  ) %>%
  select(Sample, Gene, DEL, DUP) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(DEL, DUP),
    names_to = "CNV_type",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Feature = paste(Gene, CNV_type, sep = "_")
  )
```

```{r}

```
